summary: Iteration 19: Testing 27 new armor sets from CStone. 20/20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. New armor sets display correctly with CStone images, variant selectors, stats (Max Temp, Min Temp, Radiation), and loot/purchase locations.

issues: Console hydration warnings (span inside select/option) - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected (same as previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: personal_gear.py correctly defines all 27 new ARMOR_SETS entries with proper types, manufacturers, stats, variants, and loot_locations
armor_enhancer.py ARMOR_WIKI_OVERRIDES includes all 27 new set names for wiki fallback image lookup
armor_enhancer.py _SET_LOOT_LOCATIONS includes all 27 new set names with specific loot locations
get_armor_image() correctly falls back to first variant's CStone image when no 'Base' entry exists
get_armor_variant_data() correctly returns sold=false for loot-only variants from CStone API
Frontend ArmorCard component displays new sets with CStone images, stats, and variant selectors correctly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - CStone API provides armor images dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 added 27 new armor sets from CStone. Total armor count now 55 (was 28). New sets include: Heavy (Ana, Bokto, Citadel-SE, DCP Armor, Dust Devil, Dust Devil Armor, Morozov-SH-I, Wrecker), Medium (Aves Shrike/Starchaser/Talon, Carrion, Clash, DustUp, GCD-Army, Stitcher, Strata-12 variants, Testudo-7 variants), Light (Aztalan Galena/Tamarack, Carnifex, Carnifex Armor, Chiron, Field Recon Suit, Geist Armor-8 variants, Microid Battle Suit-5 variants, Piecemeal Armor). 3 original sets without CStone images: Novikov, Sterling, Odyssey II. Test user: e1agent/test123.
